title: ClaudeMax Agent Frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of an agent markdown file. Fields under the 'Claude Code native' group are consumed by Claude Code; the rest are additive ClaudeMax metadata that Claude Code ignores.

name.description: Unique kebab-case identifier. Must match the filename (without .md).

description.description: When this agent should be invoked. Start with a trigger phrase ('Use when ...'); Claude uses this to route work. Keep it specific and outcome-oriented.

model.description: Model tier the subagent should run on.

tools.description: Comma-separated allowlist of tools the agent may use (e.g. 'Read, Grep, Glob'). Omit to inherit all tools. Narrow this to the minimum the agent needs.

tags.description: Free-form lowercase tags for search and catalog filtering.

version.description: Semantic version of this agent definition.

maintainer.description: Email or handle of the primary maintainer.

skills.description: Names of backing skills (skill `name` fields) this agent relies on. Used to cross-link the catalog and verify dependencies exist.

status.description: Lifecycle stage. 'experimental' agents are excluded from default installs.
